description_long: This is a stylized adult male figure with an exaggeratedly large head and slender body proportions, dressed in casual urban attire. The figure wears a long-sleeve raglan shirt with contrasting sleeves and fitted jeans, paired with low-profile athletic shoes. The facial features are detailed, with a short hairstyle and a neutral expression. The hands are relaxed at the sides, and the posture is upright, suggesting a natural standing pose. The clothing fits closely to the body, emphasizing the slim build. The overall appearance is cartoonish yet recognizable as a typical city pedestrian.
description: A stylized adult male figure with a large head, casual long-sleeve shirt, fitted jeans, and athletic shoes, standing upright in a relaxed pose.
description_view_0: Side view showing the slim profile, arm position, and the contrast between the shirt sleeves and torso.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the large head, facial features, and the full design of the shirt and jeans.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, with the other arm and side of the face visible.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back of the head, shirt, and jeans, with both arms visible from behind.
attribute_clothing_type: casual long-sleeve shirt and fitted jeans
